base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of alien_cell_pod — a effect_layer from 1987 contra. Biomechanical cell-pod — pulses. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Biomechanical cell-pod — pulses → splits → releases hugger
